description.id: Visualisasi produk 3D yang realistis untuk presentasi, pitching investor, atau pre-production. Dari konsep sketsa menjadi model 3D yang detail dan siap produksi.
description.en: Realistic 3D product visualization for presentations, investor pitching, or pre-production. From concept sketches to detailed, production-ready 3D models.

description.id: Desain interior 3D untuk rumah, kantor, cafe, apartemen, dan komersial. Visualisasi photorealistic yang membantu klien melihat ruangan sebelum direalisasikan.
description.en: 3D interior design for homes, offices, cafes, apartments, and commercial spaces. Photorealistic visualization that helps clients see rooms before they are built.

description.id: Animasi produk 3D berkualitas tinggi untuk iklan, media sosial, dan presentasi. Termasuk exploded view, assembly animation, dan cinematic product showcase.
description.en: High-quality 3D product animation for ads, social media, and presentations. Includes exploded view, assembly animation, and cinematic product showcase.

description.id: Asset 3D yang dioptimasi untuk game — characters, props, environments, vehicles. Low-poly hingga high-poly dengan PBR materials dan proper UV mapping.
description.en: Optimized 3D assets for games — characters, props, environments, vehicles. Low-poly to high-poly with PBR materials and proper UV mapping.

description.id: Pengembangan game lengkap dari konsep hingga publish. Mendukung platform mobile (Android/iOS), desktop (PC/Mac), serta teknologi immersive AR, VR, dan MR.
description.en: Complete game development from concept to publish. Supporting mobile (Android/iOS), desktop (PC/Mac), and immersive AR, VR, and MR technologies.

description.id: Render visual 3D berkualitas tinggi untuk berbagai kebutuhan — arsitektur, produk, medical, scientific visualization, dan konten marketing.
description.en: High-quality 3D visual renders for various needs — architecture, product, medical, scientific visualization, and marketing content.
